data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a different return location for one-way rentals, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for a different return location, yet there are no API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this feature is implemented or enforced in the system. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of different return locations for one-way rentals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
